title: Orientation Day — Day One
body: 40 students walk into Netrokona University's CSE department — nervous, excited, and ready to start a four-year adventure. The first handshakes, the first faces, the first step of our journey together. Replace this with your actual orientation day memory.
caption: 📍 CSE Dept. · Netrokona University · Replace with real photo

title: First Mid-Term Exams
body: Our first real test as university students. Late-night study sessions, canteen coffee, and the shared panic of not knowing what to expect. Replace with real exam memories.

title: First Batch Picnic
body: The first time we got together outside class — a picnic that turned into a tradition. Replace this with real details: venue, date, who organised it, what happened.

title: First Hackathon
body: 48 hours, a team of four, too much caffeine, and our first product. Replace this with which hackathon, who was on the team, what you built, and how it went.

title: Cultural Fest 2027
body: Music, drama, dance, and competitions. The department's annual cultural festival — where we finally saw sides of each other that lectures never revealed. Replace with real fest name and memories.

body: Three days, 40 people, one bus, and memories that outlast every hard drive. Replace with actual destination, highlights, and who organised it.

title: Thesis Proposals Submitted
body: The moment it got real. Final-year thesis topics chosen, supervisors assigned, and the countdown to graduation began. Replace with actual thesis titles and supervisors.

title: Farewell Night 2029
body: The last time we were all in one room — dressed up, nostalgic, and trying not to cry. Replace with actual date, venue, and memories from the night.

title: Convocation Day — Graduation 2029
body: Four years distilled into one handshake and a scroll. This page is for that day. Update with the actual convocation date when confirmed by the university.
